recommendations.title: Under the Same Moon
recommendations.overview: Tells the parallel stories of nine-year-old Carlitos and his mother, Rosario. In the hopes of providing a better life for her son, Rosario works illegally in the U.S. while her mother cares for Carlitos back in Mexico.

recommendations.title: Miracles from Heaven
recommendations.overview: When Christy discovers her 10-year-old daughter Anna has a rare, incurable disease, she becomes a ferocious advocate for her daughter’s healing as she searches for a solution. After Anna has a freak accident and falls three stories, a miracle unfolds

recommendations.title: The 33
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of the collapse of a mine in San Jose, Chile—that left 33 miners isolated underground for 69 days.

recommendations.title: Lemonade Mouth
recommendations.overview: When five ragtag freshman first meet in detention, it seems they have nothing in common. But, through music, they form an unbreakable bond and discover they have the makings of the greatest high school garage band in history! In the face of incredibl

recommendations.title: G20
recommendations.overview: After the G20 Summit is overtaken by terrorists, President Danielle Sutton must bring all her statecraft and military experience to defend her family and her fellow leaders.

recommendations.title: I Swear
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome at 15, John Davidson navigates his way against the odds through troubled teenage years and into adulthood, finding inspiration in the kindness of others to discover his true purpose in life.

recommendations.title: Book Club
recommendations.overview: Four lifelong friends decide that their lives could change by becoming nasty and reading Fifty Shades of Grey in their monthly book club to get inspiration on how to handle sexual pleasure at an elderly age.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: Kill Boksoon
recommendations.overview: At work, she's a renowned assassin. At home, she's a single mom to a teenage daughter. Killing? That's easy. It's parenting that's the hard part.
